title: Russian Kidney Bean Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole featuring roasted kidney beans and a delicious, creamy sauce.
instructions: Sauté the onion and garlic in a pan until softened.
Add the roasted kidney beans, ground casserole (if using), diced tomatoes, and beef broth. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 10 minutes.
Stir in the Russian-style sour cream and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with shredded cheddar cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (optional).
